sizing_rule.note: Modern Portfolio Theory (Markowitz) optimization: allocate weights X_i across securities to minimize portfolio variance V subject to sum(X_i)=1 constraint for target expected return E. Uses correlation matrix R_a,b = COV_a,b/(S_a*S_b) to find efficient frontier allocation. No single risk % specified; optimal_f determination deferred to solving constrained quadratic program.

source_rule_text: Find portfolio position allocation weights (X values) that sum to 1 and minimize variance (V) for a given expected return (E) using constrained optimization.
